title: Introduction to Algorithms, 3rd Edition
description: The classic textbook for algorithms. Barely used, in excellent condition. A must-have for any computer science student.

reviews.comment: Great book, fair price, and quick exchange. Highly recommend this seller.

title: Acoustic Guitar - Yamaha F310
description: Well-maintained acoustic guitar, perfect for beginners. Comes with a soft case and a few picks. Selling because I upgraded.

title: Mini Fridge - 4L Capacity
description: Small mini-fridge, great for dorm rooms. Can hold a 6-pack of cans. In perfect working condition.

reviews.comment: Works as described. A bit of cosmetic wear but functions perfectly.

title: Scientific Calculator - TI-84 Plus
description: Required for many math and science courses. In great condition, with a new set of batteries.
